page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u1-c1m8.8xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by an Intel Xeon CPU running at 2.5 GHz. It features 32 dedicated physical cores and 32 vCPUs, paired with 256.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. This instance does not include local storage or dedicated GPU hardware, relying instead on network-attached storage and utilizing a KVM hypervisor. Baseline network performance is rated at 10 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks indicate a clear tradeoff between single-core and multi-core capabilities. Single-core processing speeds, such as those measured by stress-ng and Geekbench, fall into the lower 25% tier, with single-threaded gzip compression registering in the bottom 10%. However, multi-core performance scales to average levels, as demonstrated by multi-threaded bzip3 decompression, Geekbench multi-core, and Passmark CPU tests. Memory bandwidth benchmarks for both cached and uncached reads and writes also perform within the average range, though the overall Passmark memory score remains relatively weak.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the instance offers a dense memory allocation relative to its compute resources, making it a viable option for workloads that require substantial memory capacity without demanding top-tier single-core CPU speeds. It is well-suited for memory-intensive applications such as database operations, Redis caching layers, static web serving, and moderate multi-threaded processing tasks like software compilation and medium-sized language model inference.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u1-c1m8.8xlarge is an x86_64 memory-optimized server instance featuring 32 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs running at 2.5 GHz and 256.0 GB of RAM. Lacking local storage and GPU accelerators, it relies on a 10 Gbps baseline network connection. Benchmark data reveals a distinct performance profile: single-core processing and memory latency scores are relatively weak, while multi-core execution, memory bandwidth, and database operations perform at average levels. This resource configuration makes the instance a cost-efficient choice for memory-heavy workloads that do not require high single-threaded CPU performance. It is best suited for database hosting, Redis caching, static web serving, and multi-threaded data processing.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u1-c1m8.8xlarge is an x86_64 server with 32 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 256 GB RAM, and 10 Gbps network bandwidth, offering average multi-core and weak single-core performance.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u1-c1m8.8xlarge features 32 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 256 GB RAM, and 10 Gbps network speed, optimized for memory-intensive workloads.
tagline: A memory-dense virtual server offering balanced multi-core performance and high memory capacity for database and caching workloads.
bullet_points: 32 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs and 256.0 GB of RAM.
10 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with KVM virtualization.
Average multi-core performance contrasted with weaker single-core speeds.
No local storage or GPU accelerators included.
Suitable for database operations, Redis caching, and static web serving.
